rules.title: How to Play
rules.objectiveText: Have fun and accumulate as many points as possible to be crowned the King/Queen of Kardaoke!
rules.step1: The Maestro chooses a song and sings a part of it (2-3 lines).
rules.step2: When the Maestro signals, the Backup Singers sing the next line together.
rules.step3: Points are awarded based on who gets it right.
rules.scoringBackup: Each correct Backup Singer earns 15 points.
rules.scoringMaestro: The Maestro earns 10 points per correct Backup Singer.
rules.scoringBonus: The Maestro gets bonus points based on how few words they sang (fewer words = more bonus!).
rules.cardsExplain: Draw cards for extra challenges and bonus points! Yellow (easy, 5pts), Blue (medium, 20pts), Red (hard, 50-100pts).
rules.heldCardsText1: Yellow cards must be used immediately when drawn.
rules.heldCardsText2: Blue or Red cards can be kept for up to 2 rounds, but you can only hold one card at a time.
rules.heldCardsText3: If a held card isn't used in time, it's discarded.
rules.cardFulfillmentText1: A card is only fulfilled if at least one Backup Singer sang the next line correctly.
rules.cardFulfillmentText2: If no one gets it right, the card is not fulfilled and returns to the bottom of the deck.
rules.cardFulfillmentText3: Card bonus points are tallied at the end of the game, not during play.
rules.advancedDrawText1: Once per game, the Maestro can draw one card from each difficulty level (3 cards total).
rules.advancedDrawText2: The Maestro must pick a song that fulfills at least 2 of the 3 cards.
rules.advancedDrawText3: Fulfilled cards are kept; the unfulfilled card returns to its deck.
rules.cardStealingText1: When enabled, the Maestro can steal face-up fulfilled cards from other players instead of drawing a card.
rules.cardStealingText2: Cards must be stolen from at least 2 different players.
rules.cardStealingText3: Only one card can be stolen per player.
rules.cardStealingText4: The Maestro's song must fulfill the conditions on the stolen cards. Unfulfilled cards stay with their owner.
rules.otherRulesText1: Each song can only be used once per game.
rules.otherRulesText2: You must not show your Inspiration Card to other players until the turn is completed.
rules.otherRulesText3: If a card isn't relevant (e.g. not enough players), show it, discard it, and draw a replacement.

modeSelect.title: How do you want to play?
modeSelect.passAndPlayDesc: Share one device. Pass it to each Maestro when it's their turn.
modeSelect.onlineRoomDesc: Everyone plays on their own device. One person creates a room, others join with a code.
